description: User provides contact details for tenant; task closes after confirmation.

task.title: Missing contact info: Sam Okafor
task.body: Tenant "Sam Okafor" has no phone number or email on file. Add contact details so they can be reached.

dialog.content: Sam Okafor has no phone or email on record. Without this, we can't send lease renewals, payment reminders, or emergency notices. Do you have their contact details?
Yes — phone is 206-555-0192, email is sam.okafor@email.com.
Updated Sam's record with phone 206-555-0192 and email sam.okafor@email.com. Task resolved.

criteria: Agent explains why missing contact info is consequential (not just compliance theater)
Agent captures both fields from a single response without redundant confirmation steps
Agent confirms both fields were saved before closing
Dialog resolves in three turns or fewer
